name: Novali
description: Novali (ノバーリ Nobāri) is a Mage of the Quatro Cerberus guild, as well as a member of its team taking part in X791's Grand Magic Games. On the third day of the Grand Magic Games, he is chosen to represent Quatro Cerberus for the Day's event. It consists on defeating monsters of different levels to earn points and progress.   ~!However, the event is finished by Erza Scarlet alone, which amazes the entire audience. When the Magic Power Finder is announced, Nobarly later strikes the MPF after Millianna, gaining 124 score, and becomes disappointed.!~ (Source: Fairy Tail Wiki)
